nodes.label: AI as baseline for creative work
nodes.grounding_span: only use AI's thoughts as a baseline, and add my creative touch

nodes.label: AI communication authenticity
nodes.grounding_span: glaringly obvious when someone copies and pastes messaging from AI

nodes.label: AI as skill maintainer
nodes.grounding_span: I want to maintain my skills anyway

nodes.label: Organizational AI adoption culture
nodes.grounding_span: my company is a maaajor late adopter when it comes to AI

nodes.label: Professional effectiveness and value creation
nodes.grounding_span: give the business leader what they wanted in sentiment without incurring the cost

nodes.label: Personal skill mastery and authenticity
nodes.grounding_span: I am a gifted writer and overall communicator, so I like to apply that skill

nodes.label: Organizational alignment and clarity
nodes.grounding_span: global org hasn't released cut and dry policy around AI

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as bootlegging tool
nodes.grounding_span: I was very satisfied with the way that AI helped me to come up with a 'bootlegged' version

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's unnatural wording
nodes.grounding_span: something is worded in a way that sounds unnatural

nodes.label: Preference for own communication over AI
nodes.grounding_span: I really prefer to write my own communications

nodes.label: Awareness of organizational AI ambiguity
nodes.grounding_span: we just have to follow suit in a haze of ambiguity

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: go back and forth asking it to tweak one things or another

nodes.label: Context-rich prompting with bias awareness
nodes.grounding_span: I explain the situation to the model in great detail
